description: Versioned map from each canonical .agents source to every generated tool-specific adapter path. Only the canonical sources and this manifest are hand-authored; every listed adapter path is reproduced byte-for-byte by the generator and verified by `npm run check:adapters`. Editing an adapter directly is a hand-edit and fails parity.

adapters.wrapper: YAML frontmatter plus a canonical-source pointer, scope line, and the verbatim role instructions.
YAML frontmatter plus a canonical-source pointer, scope line, and the verbatim role instructions.
TOML key/value pairs; the canonical-source pointer and scope are folded into developer_instructions.
Canonical SKILL.md frontmatter followed by a generated-adapter pointer that links back to the canonical skill; carries no independently authored guidance.
Canonical SKILL.md frontmatter followed by a generated-adapter pointer that links back to the canonical skill; carries no independently authored guidance.
Canonical SKILL.md frontmatter followed by a generated-adapter pointer that links back to the canonical skill; carries no independently authored guidance.
